motifs.name: wave_pattern
motifs.description: Ocean wave pattern, central to Moklen identity

motifs.name: fishing_spear
motifs.description: Spear pattern reflecting the Moklen tradition of spearfishing with wooden harpoons in shallow reefs

motifs.name: mangrove_root
motifs.description: Tangled root pattern from the mangrove forests where Moklen build stilt houses and gather shellfish

motifs.name: monsoon_cloud
motifs.description: Heavy cloud band pattern representing the monsoon that shapes the Moklen seasonal cycle

motifs.name: pearl_oyster
motifs.description: Oyster shell pattern reflecting the Moklen practice of free-diving for pearls and mother-of-pearl
